allow: PowerShell(python -m pip install pandas openpyxl streamlit plotly openai python-dotenv -q 2>&1)
PowerShell(python -c "from google import genai; print\('google-genai version:', genai.__version__\)")

Bash(python -c "import os; from dotenv import load_dotenv; load_dotenv\(\); print\('KEY:', os.getenv\('GOOGLE_API_KEY', 'NOT FOUND'\)[:10] + '...' if os.getenv\('GOOGLE_API_KEY'\) else 'NOT FOUND'\)")
